comment: World flips (Q10, §3), full arc ending 2 of 2 — left broken. The other seal takes the `left` terminal, which flips NOTHING: the group state is never touched, so the broken span stays instanced and the rebuilt span stays authored-dark. Every ending of the storyline gets its own root-to-terminal run (§10). Same record as brook_bridge_rebuilt.test.json.

stages.journal: Word came that the brook bridge gave way in the night.
I stood at the broken span. The far bank waited across the water.
We decided to rebuild. The timber came up from the mill.
Three days on, the new bridge held our weight. The far bank opens again.
We left it broken; the ford will have to do.
